programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A convicted arsonist claims his innocence and with no lawyer, no money and only a fifth-grade education, sets out to prove it.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A canine behaviorist uses the family dogs, who are the only witnesses, to find the murderer of their owner.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Forensic science and deductive reasoning determine what happened to a mother and daughter while they were on a shopping spree.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Exploring how an American hit single from 1966 -- "The Cheater" by Bob Kuban and the In-Men -- foreshadowed the demise of the group's lead singer, Walter Scott.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Eight years after a man confessed to the murder of a young woman, another man claims that he committed the crime, and investigators must use forensic evidence to determine the true killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Although a group of teenage thugs are suspected of attacking two boys on a fishing trip, there is no solid evidence until a murky fishing hole provides some answers.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When young prostitute's body turns up in an Ohio waterway, authorities have one tiny clue which could point to her killer, but face huge challenges due to her policemen clients and DNA evidence being washed away.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a small South Carolina town in 1991, 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd, a popular high school student, is raped, murdered and dumped in a deserted field; with few leads, authorities test the DNA of several friends, and one match shocks everyone.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a groundbreaking case using animal DNA, investigators use forensic testing on a cat to help them solve the case of a woman who vanished from her home on Prince Edward Island.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A look into the 1984 Oregon food poisonings, where detectives track down the outbreak to a cult which aims to use germ warfare to take down the government.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead from a gunshot wound and police suspect her husband, however, forensic teams prove what really happened, and the truth is stranger than fiction.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After American Atheists founder Madalyn Murray O'Hair disappears, the discovery of a mutilated body helps police catch the culprit.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two people witness a truck driving over an unconscious man and flee into a nearby bar, but when the police turn up, the truck, the man and the witnesses are gone.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Insect evidence helps to solve the mystery of a woman found dead near a river bank.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A girl who is abducted and then released soon afterward uses her knowledge of forensics to lead police to the kidnapper.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A trash collector finds a severed human leg in a trash bin, but police cannot use conventional methods of victim identification; investigators turn to toxicology and DNA tests to find the murder-mutilator.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of a mail-order bride proves suspicious when detectives learn that two of the Texas husband's previous wives had died in mysterious circumstances.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A jeweler's search through old sales records helps police find likely suspects in the murder of elderly couple Edward Kowalzck and Gertrude Thompson.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A garbage bag leads police to a child's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth that helps police solve a crime without a body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The sensitive nose of a forensic examiner sniffs out murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Discovering that an assault suspect is left-handed is crucial to a police investigation dating back 16 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Forensic scientists try to find a way to "lift" the serial number from a shotgun that's their only clue in a case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigating the worst arson spree in U.S. history -- a rash of more than 75 fires near Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Computers aid the police and FBI in solving a string of crimes.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Using an anonymous letter and geographical profiling, investigators close in on a serial rapist, and a cleverly obtained DNA sample confirms their suspicions.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young boy has serious respiratory problems and his father shows signs of early Alzheimer's disease, a chance encounter with a stranger kicks off an investigation into the cause.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police in St. Petersburg, Fla., use cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to find a surgeon's killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman wins her release after being imprisoned for allegedly killing her mother in a car fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities are able to apprehend a kidnapper because he allowed his victim to write a will on a telltale pad of paper.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tests reveal the race, eye color and hair color of the person responsible for killing two young women on Halloween night.

programme.title: CNN News Central (HLN)
programme.desc: The anchors share the latest stories about significant events that take place across the world and interview prominent figures.

programme.title: CNN News Central (HLN)
programme.desc: The anchors share the latest stories about significant events that take place across the world and interview prominent figures.

programme.title: CNN News Central (HLN)
programme.desc: The anchors share the latest stories about significant events that take place across the world and interview prominent figures.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: When a beautiful college student is stabbed to death in her Knoxville apartment, suspicion immediately falls on her roommate; a bloody shoe print left by the killer exposes a murderer with no history of violence and no reason to kill.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Numerous suspects emerge after someone starts targeting law enforcement officers in a peaceful Texas county.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: An Illinois mother and her two young children are brutally murdered in their beds, and lurid threats are spray painted all over the walls of the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A young Texas teenager and her boyfriend are brutally attacked on Valentine's Day; she is found dead while her boyfriend escapes; the case goes cold for nearly 50 years before a new forensic test exposes a family man with a dark secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Three Indiana construction workers are found shot on a work site.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A Texan who vows to live a reformed life after being released from prison is subsequently convicted of murder, despite insisting his innocence, so he uses forensic science from behind bars to try to prove his case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: An extremely successful California career woman keeps falling ill and doctors can't determine why, then after she dies they still have no explanation until they find a key figure in her life has been lying about his past.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: The body of a 24-year-old criminology student is found wrapped in a blanket alongside a desolate road in Brooklyn, N.Y.; police discover that the bouncer at a bar is her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: When a 79-year-old woman is found shot to death in her home, investigators initially suspect her husband or a violent neighbor; shell casings recovered at the scene and a high-tech database reveal an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A young single mother is abducted from a gas station and is later found stabbed to death near an oil field; the detectives use shoe and tire impressions to weed out numerous suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: When a 23-year-old Marine dies in his bedroom, doctors initially believe a heart attack is to blame; when arsenic is found in his organs, his wife is charged with murder; a sharp attorney and toxicological testing uncover the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: When an 18-year-old girl is abducted while talking on a pay phone, forensic evidence found on her clothing points police in the direction of a suspect who shockingly confesses that he didn't act alone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A coroner finds telltale clues on the badly burned body of a murder victim, sending police in pursuit of a couple of killers.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man is arrested and convicted for a series of sexual assaults in Indiana; years later, forensic developments reveal new facts about the case.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of a young Seattle couple puzzles investigators until the victims' dog, Chief, leads police to the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A handsome young doctor's fiancée experiences severe illness after revealing that she is pregnant, and launches her own investigation to determine if the doctor is somehow responsible.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A seemingly model citizen turns out to be a serial killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An abandoned, still-running car leads investigators to a body with unusual marks and a DNA trail that lead to the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police find fragments of deleted computer files leading them to suspect a woman's suicide is really murder.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious neighbor gives police a break in a cold case.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family suspects their teenage daughter's new friends were involved in her disappearance.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 62-year-old man opens a car restoration business and becomes seriously ill, his doctors cannot find the cause, but forensics can; identification of a highly toxic metal in the victim's blood leads to his poisoner.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 6-year-old disappears, her father becomes the prime suspect; he fails a polygraph test and even confesses, but 10 years later, the investigation gets turned on its head.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators build a makeshift tent around a woman's body and use superglue fumes to lift the killer's palm print from the victim's skin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of a mail-order bride proves suspicious when detectives learn that two of the Texas husband's previous wives had died in mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Experts debate whether an apparent heart attack victim died from natural causes or alleged poisoning by his girlfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 12-year-old was found dead in her home, police were left clueless until a string of burglaries months later. A trail of stolen goods may help solve a murder.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Marlene Miller was murdered, it would take 24 years and several retrials before forensic scientists discovered the evidence to bring her killer to justice.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives use a forged signature to find a woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed two days before she was scheduled to testify against a man accused of assaulting her and the prime suspect has an alibi.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bite mark is all the evidence needed to convict a suspect who was robbing tourists in Florida.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Technology able to analyze human bite-marks yields information on a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A death in Pennsylvania is strikingly similar to one in North Carolina.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a nurse starts experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms, she discovers that she is HIV-positive; she learns that her infection was not accidental.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal when a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obscure print found at a crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A diner in a small town, an endocrinologist and a forensic botanist help destroy a prime suspect's alibi.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Neighbors do not hear the gunshots when a union official is killed in his home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who murdered his wife; forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the man's motives.

programme.title: CNN This Morning
programme.desc: Stories from across the world and refreshing conversations with Audie Cornish.

programme.title: CNN This Morning
programme.desc: Stories from across the world and refreshing conversations with Audie Cornish.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators see through a killer trying to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene to learn what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young girl beaten after watching her grandmother killed, identifies the wrong person; years later she tries to change her statement.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984 police failed to convict the murderer of a college student; new technology may finally help the police to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a young woman found murdered two weeks after reporting a road rage incident; evidence leads not to the aggressive driver, but one of their own.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a single mother is murdered, her brother vows to find the person responsible for the death of his sister, even if it takes more than 30 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A husband and wife get shot, and their 16-year-old daughter manages to escape, but investigators suspect she may be involved in the murder.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 years, a witness decides to do the right thing about the rape and murder of a young hairdresser.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate the possibility of a hate crime when two women go missing and are later found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a human skeleton is found on marshland and determined to be at least 18 months old, a computer consultant gives her a face and name.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer places all the incriminating evidence to the murder in a plastic bag, hoping it will float down the river.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's body is found inside a burned mobile home and the autopsy reveals she was beaten, making this a murder.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Security guard who disappeared from his post was found a year later in a remote camp site; a decade later, a phone call and a paint smear on his boot helped scientists determine what happened during his final moments.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When three students are brutally murdered close to campus, investigators must determine what the women had in common before their serial killer strikes again.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bag full of evidence recovered from an iced-over river helps to reveal the murderer of a businesswoman in her own shop.
